title: gravesia serpens
intro: Gravesia serpens, also known as the serpent's tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Gravesia serpens include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Gravesia serpens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
